Name: Hestia's Hearth
Effect: If all 5 dice odd or even, +3 Favour
Code Implementation: Checks gameState.dice.every(die => die.face % 2 === 1/0), adds result.favour += 3

Name: Charon's Ferry Fare
Code Implementation: Checks result.finalScore > 0, calls gameEngine.updateGoldAnimated(1)

Name: Achilles' Heel
Code Implementation: before_score: result.pips += 15; turn_start: gameState.gold -= 1

Name: Midas Touch
Code Implementation: Calculates Math.floor(gameState.gold / 5) * 1, adds to result.pips

Name: Icarus' Wings
Effect: +10 Pips per unused roll, 1/8 break chance
Code Implementation: before_score: result.pips += gameState.rollsLeft * 10; turn_end: Math.random() < 1/8 destroys joker

Name: Lethe Waters
Code Implementation: result.pips += 25 (dice filtering is cosmetic/description only)

Name: Forge of Hephaestus
Effect: +0.5 Favour per unused roll, in a turn
Code Implementation: result.favour += Math.min(gameState.rollsLeft * 0.5, 1.5)

Name: Prometheus' Gift
Code Implementation: before_score: result.favour += 3; turn_start: gameState.rollsLeft -= 1

Name: Chaos Primordial
Code Implementation: before_score: result.favour += currentFavour (doubles); turn_start: gameState.rollsLeft -= 1

Name: Mt Olympus
Code Implementation: result.favour += (gameState.worshipCardsUsed || 0)

Name: Sisyphus' Boulder
Effect: +5 Pips per reroll this turn (reset each turn)
Code Implementation: result.pips += (STARTING_ROLLS - gameState.rollsLeft) * 5

Name: Kronos' Hourglass
Code Implementation: gameState.rollsLeft = Math.floor(prng.random() * 5) + 1

Name: Pandora's Jar
Code Implementation: if turn % 3 === 0: result.favourMult *= 2, destroy random boon in turn_start

Name: Demeter's Harvest
Code Implementation: Picks random die.faces[key], sets modifiedValue += 1 (max 9)

Name: Medusa's Gaze
Code Implementation: after_roll: dice with face===6 set die.held=true; before_score: +0.5 favour if lower sanctum category

Name: Dionysus' Revelry
Effect: dice showing 2 pairs can be scored as full house

Name: Apollo's Oracle
Effect: +1 reroll per turn, reduce score input by 20%
Code Implementation: , +1 reroll: reduce score input by 20%

Name: Hydra's Heads
Effect: +3 Favour when scoring with exactly 2 dice
Code Implementation: if gameState.dice.filter(d => d.face > 0).length === 2: result.favour += 3

Name: Tantalus' Curse
Effect: +0.1 Favour per gold, can't spend gold
Code Implementation: result.favour += gameState.gold * 0.5; shop checks hasTantalusCurse and blocks purchases

Name: Pegasus' Flight
Code Implementation: result.favour += gameState.dice.filter(d => d.face >= 6).length * 0.5

Name: Cerberus' Watch
Code Implementation: result.pips += gameState.dice.filter(d => d.held).slice(0,3).length * 3

Name: The Trojan Horse
Code Implementation: Checks gameState.turn >= 11, sets gameState.boonMultiplier = 2, applied in Joker.applyTimingEffect

Name: Lucky Dice Bag
Code Implementation: dice.forEach: if die.face === 1 && !die.hasBeenRerolled: die.roll(), die.hasBeenRerolled = true

Name: Gambler's Charm
Code Implementation: if Math.random() < 0.5: +2 gold, else: -1 gold

Name: Marathon Runner
Effect: +1 Pips per roll, destroy at 42 or 3 scratches
Code Implementation: after_roll: this.marathonPips++; before_score: result.pips += this.marathonPips; after_score: check scratch count or ≥42

Name: Golden Touch
Code Implementation: Modified interest calculation in shop/economy logic (1 gold per 3 saved)

Name: Mathematician's Compass
Effect: +10 Pips if sum is divisable by 10
Code Implementation: if gameState.dice.reduce((sum,die) => sum + die.face, 0) % 10 === 0: result.pips += 10

Name: Prime Time
Code Implementation: Counts primes [2,3,5,7], looks up bonus in [0,1,2,3,5,7] array

Name: The Locksmith
Effect: Held dice +1 pip per roll held
Code Implementation: after_roll: if die.held: die.rollsHeld++; before_score: sum die.rollsHeld; turn_start: reset rollsHeld

Name: The Merchant
Code Implementation: Checks result.cardType === 'worship'||'libation', gameState.gold += 1

Name: The Heretic
Effect: +2 Pips per turn, reset on worship use
Code Implementation: turn_start: gameState.hereticStacks += 2; before_score: result.pips += hereticStacks; reset in WorshipCard

Name: Reckless Abandon
Code Implementation: before_score: result.pips += 50; after_roll: gameState.dice.forEach(d => d.held = false)

Name: Typhon
Code Implementation: after_roll: if first roll && all 1s: gameState.typhonBonus = threshold * 0.9; before_score: apply bonus

Name: Early Bird
Effect: T1-3: +20 Pips, T4-5: +2 Gold, T6-13: -5 Pips
Code Implementation: Checks gameState.turn ranges, applies appropriate bonus/penalty

Name: The Symposium
Code Implementation: Counts dice faces, if any count >= 4: result.favour += 1

Name: Assembly of Heroes
Code Implementation: if gameState.jokers.length >= maxBoonSlots: result.pips += 15

Name: Divine Synergy
Code Implementation: Counts rarities, for each rarity with 2+: bonus += (count-1) * 5

Name: First Blood
Code Implementation: if Object.keys(gameState.scorecard).length === 0: result.pips += 50

Name: Midnight Oil
Code Implementation: if turn >= 12: result.pips += 24; turn_start: if turn >= 12: rollsLeft -= 1

Name: Parmenides Die
Effect: one random die rolled die face becomes enhanced for that turn
Code Implementation: Picks random die, sets die.isParmenidesDie = true,

Name: Doubling Season
Effect: Even dice +2 pips, odd dice -1 pip
Code Implementation: forEach die: if even: result.pips += die.face; if odd && >1: result.pips -= 1

Name: Symmetry
Code Implementation: after_roll: checks if dice pattern is palindrome, this.symmetryFavour += 0.5; before_score: apply accumulated

Name: Misery
Code Implementation: if gameState.gold === 0: result.favour += 2

Name: Smog of Morpheus
Code Implementation: if rollsLeft === 0: forEach die where face === 2 or 4: die.face = 3

Name: The Zealot
Effect: +1 Favour if scoring last worship god's category
Code Implementation: Checks gameState.lastWorshipGod, maps to category, if match: result.favour += 1

Name: Mortal Vineyard
Code Implementation: if result.cardType === 'joker': create random libation, add to consumables

Name: Proteus' Disguise
Effect: Mimic random boon each turn (no repeat)
Code Implementation: turn_start: picks random boon (excluding self and last), stores gameState.proteusMimicId; executes that boon's effects

Name: Cornucopia of Ploutos
Code Implementation: gameState.gold = Math.floor(gameState.gold * 1.5)

Name: The Odyssey
Effect: All categories filled, no scratches = (count)² pips
Code Implementation: Checks all categories filled && no zeros, gameState.totalScore += count²

Name: Message in a Bottle
Code Implementation: if !gameState.hadOtherBoonsThisAnte: totalScore += threshold * 0.5

Name: Betrayal by Paris
Effect: Ante end: destroy random boon, +10 Gold
Code Implementation: Picks random boon (not self), destroys it, gameState.gold += 10

Name: Eruption of Etna
Code Implementation: if gameState.boonTriggersThisTurn >= 3: this.etnaFavourStacks++; result.favour += etnaFavourStacks

Name: Cycle of Seasons
Effect: Worship triggers spread +1 to another god
Code Implementation: In WorshipCard.applyWorship: picks random other god, worshipLevels[god] += 1

Name: Ascetic's Vow
Code Implementation: emptySlots = maxSlots - filledSlots; result.favour += emptySlots

Name: Bellows of War
Effect: 3/4 of Kind score as if +1 matching die
Code Implementation: In GameEngine.calculateScore: reduces required count by 1, adds virtual die value to pips

Name: Nyxian Seduction
Effect: Chance: +69 Pips, reduce random god worship
Code Implementation: if category === 'Chance': result.pips += 69, pick random god (75% male), worshipLevels[god] -= 1

Name: Gold Standard
Code Implementation: Counts dice with gold enhancement on current face, result.pips += count * 3

Name: Carillon of the Muses
Effect: All 5 enhanced: +3 Favour (×2.5 if same type)
Code Implementation: Counts enhanced dice, if 5: if all same enhancement: result.favourMult *= 2.5, else: result.favour += 3

Name: Reflection of Narcissus
Code Implementation: turn_start: rollsLeft -= 2; in applyTimingEffect: if hasNarcissus && not doubling: apply effect twice

Name: Journey of Perseus
Code Implementation: result.pips += Math.floor(gameState.totalScore / 100) * 10
